card_description: Brahman is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 5 Exegesis passages. Associated with dictionary terms: Brahman. Context: "Dick proposes a "3-level" model of reality: (1) The Logos/Bible as a "punched tape" of ideas, (2) The World of Flesh/Nature, and (3) The Artificial/Technological World."
